title: Tirunallar Saniswaran Temple
tagline: Tirunallar Saniswaran Temple — spiritual town of Puducherry

overview.short: Dharbaranyeswarar Temple, more popularly known as Tirunallar Saniswaran Temple, is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in the Thirunallar village of the Karaikal d
overview.description: Dharbaranyeswarar Temple, more popularly known as Tirunallar Saniswaran Temple, is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in the Thirunallar village of the Karaikal district, in the Union territory of Puducherry, Southeastern India. The temple complex covers around 2 acres (0.81 ha) and entered through a five tiered gopuram, the main gateway. The temple has a number of shrines, with those of Shiva as Dharbaranyeswarar, his consort Praneswari Amman (Parvati), Shani (Saniswararan) and Somaskanda (a combined form of Shiva with Parvati and his son Murugan) being the most prominent. A

topPlaces.name: Keezhamanai
topPlaces.description: Keezhamanai is a revenue village in Karaikal taluk, Karaikal district, Puducherry Union territory, India. It is one of several revenue villages within the Karaikal region.

topPlaces.name: Thirunallar
topPlaces.description: Thirunallar is a small town in southeastern India in the Karaikal District of the Union Territory of Puducherry, near the town of Karaikal. The village is home to the Dharbaranyesvarar temple, dedicated to Shiva, which contains within it a shrine of Shani (Saturn).

topPlaces.name: Thirunallar taluk
topPlaces.description: Thirunallar taluk is a taluk of Karaikal District, Puducherry, India. The taluk headquarters is located at Thirunallar.

topPlaces.name: Pettai, Karaikal
topPlaces.description: Pettai is a panchayat village and revenue village in Pondicherry Union Territory, India. Administratively, Pettai is under the Thirunallar Taluk (formerly Thirunallar Commune Panchayat) of Karaikal District, Pondicherry Union Territory.

topPlaces.name: Thennankudy
topPlaces.description: Thennankudy is a revenue village in the Thirunallar taluk of Karaikal District. It is situated to the west of Thirunallar.

topPlaces.name: Elyankudi
topPlaces.description: Elyankudi is a revenue village in the Thirunallar taluk of Karaikal District in India. It is situated to the north-west of Thirunallar.

topPlaces.name: Sorakudy
topPlaces.description: Sorakudy is a revenue village in the Thirunallar taluk of Karaikal District. It is situated to the south of Nedungadu and north-west of Thirunallar.

topPlaces.name: Vizhithiyur
topPlaces.description: Vizhithiyur is a village in Puducherry, India. It is one of the three revenue villages in Neravy Taluk, Karaikal district.

items.note: Keezhamanai is a revenue village in Karaikal taluk, Karaikal district, Puducherry Union territory, India. It is one of several revenue villages within the Karaikal region.

Thirunallar is a small town in southeastern India in the Karaikal District of the Union Territory of Puducherry, near the town of Karaikal. The village is home to the Dharbaranyesvarar temple, dedicated to Shiva, which contains within it a shrine of Shani (Saturn).
Thirunallar taluk is a taluk of Karaikal District, Puducherry, India. The taluk headquarters is located at Thirunallar.

Pettai is a panchayat village and revenue village in Pondicherry Union Territory, India. Administratively, Pettai is under the Thirunallar Taluk (formerly Thirunallar Commune Panchayat) of Karaikal District, Pondicherry Union Territory.
Thennankudy is a revenue village in the Thirunallar taluk of Karaikal District. It is situated to the west of Thirunallar.
Elyankudi is a revenue village in the Thirunallar taluk of Karaikal District in India. It is situated to the north-west of Thirunallar.
Sorakudy is a revenue village in the Thirunallar taluk of Karaikal District. It is situated to the south of Nedungadu and north-west of Thirunallar.
Vizhithiyur is a village in Puducherry, India. It is one of the three revenue villages in Neravy Taluk, Karaikal district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tirunallar Saniswaran Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tirunallar Saniswaran Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tirunallar Saniswaran Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (118 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (120 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tirunallar Saniswaran Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tirunallar Saniswaran Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tirunallar Saniswaran Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tirunallar Saniswaran Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tirunallar Saniswaran Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Keezhamanai, Thirunallar, Thirunallar taluk, Pettai, Karaikal, Thennankudy.
